title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.853 - Duties of the secretary
text:
262.853.  Duties of the secretary. — The secretary shall keep a record of the proceedings of the board and shall be custodian of all books, documents, and papers filed with the board and of its minute book.  The secretary shall have the authority to cause to be made copies of all minutes and other records and documents of the board.
(L. 2005 S.B. 355)
